subtasks.description: Query Salesforce licensing database to extract licensed seats (by license type/edition) and actual seat assignments (by user status, role, department). Calculate utilization metrics: assigned vs licensed, gap analysis, and identify inactive/suspended accounts.

Analyze seat utilization results to identify unutilized licenses, classify unused seats by reason (inactive users, suspended accounts, unassigned licenses), and generate actionable recommendations for license optimization and cost savings.

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks with mid-tier assignment: (1) sql_gen (mid) handles a moderately complex query requiring joins across license tables and user/assignment tables with multiple metrics and status filtering—more than a simple single-table lookup but not requiring advanced window functions or CTEs. (2) cross_recon (mid) takes the query output and performs utilization classification and gap analysis with recommendation generation—standard multi-signal reconciliation without frontier-level complexity. This minimal 2-subtask plan avoids unnecessary splits; both the data retrieval and analysis-with-recommendations are consolidated into their respective agents' scope.

output.sql: SELECT publisher, product, SUM(daily_active_seats) AS total_active_seats, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_spend, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS distinct_users, COUNT(DISTINCT license_id) AS distinct_licenses, AVG(daily_active_seats) AS avg_daily_active_seats, MAX(daily_active_seats) AS max_daily_active_seats, MIN(daily_active_seats) AS min_daily_active_seats, SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'activation' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS activation_events, SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'deactivation' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS deactivation_events, SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'suspension' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS suspension_events, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN daily_active_seats = 0 THEN license_id END) AS zero_usage_licenses, COUNT(DISTINCT license_id) - COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN daily_active_seats > 0 THEN license_id END) AS unutilized_licenses, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN daily_active_seats > 0 THEN license_id END) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT license_id), 0), 2) AS utilization_rate_pct, ROUND(SUM(amount_usd) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN daily_active_seats > 0 THEN license_id END), 0), 2) AS cost_per_active_license, ROUND(SUM(amount_usd) / NULLIF(SUM(daily_active_seats), 0), 2) AS cost_per_active_seat FROM consumption_facts WHERE publisher ILIKE '%salesforce%' GROUP BY publisher, product ORDER BY unutilized_licenses DESC, total_spend DESC
